persona.name: Marcus Johnson
persona.motivations_goals: Keep students safe while building positive relationships
persona.communication_style: Clear, firm, respectful, uses humor to defuse tension
persona.knowledge_scope: Security protocols, conflict de-escalation, student behavior patterns
persona.backstory: Former police officer who preferred working with youth to prevent problems

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey everyone, have you ever thought about how art can be a mirror to our true selves, especially when it comes to identity?

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Sophia, Thomas, everything alright here? Need any help?
actions.plan: I should check in with Sophia and Thomas to see if everything is calm in the cafeteria and if they need any assistance.

actions.dialog_text: Alex, how are you holding up? Need any help with the meeting prep?
actions.plan: Sophia is busy discussing the student council meeting with Alex. I should check in with Alex directly to ensure he is doing well and see if he needs any support.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Isabella, good to see you! Let me know if you need anything.
actions.plan: Isabella just arrived and Sophia invited her to join the discussion. I should greet Isabella to maintain a positive presence and show support.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, get behind the bar counter now! Stay low and quiet.
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot and Mateo suggests hiding behind the cafeteria bar counter. I need to act quickly to ensure safety.

memories.description: Approached Sophia Anderson and Thomas Wright in the cafeteria to check on the situation and offer assistance, maintaining vigilance and readiness to act if needed.
Noticed Sophia discussing the student council meeting agenda with Alex Rivera. Approached Alex to offer support and check on his well-being.
Greeted Isabella Lopez as she joined Sophia and Alex in the cafeteria, maintaining a supportive and approachable demeanor.

Heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter nearby. Mateo Diaz urged to hide behind the cafeteria bar counter. I instructed everyone to take cover there and moved quickly to the hide spot behind the bar counter.
